claims.text: L2 regularization and weight decay are not equivalent for Adam; Adam-with-L2 under-regularizes weights with large gradient magnitudes.
Decoupled weight decay (AdamW) substantially improves Adam's generalization, making it competitive with SGD with momentum on image classification.
Decoupling makes the optimal weight decay factor independent of the learning rate.

methods.name: AdamW (decoupled weight decay)
methods.description: Modify Adam to apply weight decay directly at the parameter update (theta -= alpha*(m_hat/(sqrt(v_hat)+eps) + lambda*theta)) instead of adding lambda*theta to the gradient.
methods.runnable_hint: Implement Adam-with-L2 and AdamW in numpy on a regularized logistic regression task; compare test error at matched settings. Metric: test_error_adam_l2 vs test_error_adamw.
